response.global_analysis: The provided Reference JSON contains lyrics for the first verse of the song 'Shion', but this video segment covers the final chorus, outro, and graduation speech. Therefore, the Reference JSON is phonetically mismatched for the musical parts and has been discarded. I am transcribing the lyrics and speech directly from the audio, ensuring timestamps are precisely synchronized with the vocal delivery. The on-screen text from the final slide is also included.

subtitles.original: 連れて すぐに
subtitles.english: Bring me, right away

subtitles.original: 伝えたい想いを声に出したって
subtitles.english: Even if I give voice to the feelings I want to convey

subtitles.original: こんな言葉なんて言えないんだろう
subtitles.english: I guess I wouldn't be able to say words like these

subtitles.original: 大事に想ってしまうから ずっと
subtitles.english: Because I've come to cherish them so much, forever

subtitles.original: 大事なことが伝わらないんじゃないかって
subtitles.english: Thinking that the important things might not get across

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know

subtitles.original: 知りたくもないことばっかで
subtitles.english: It's full of things I don't even want to know

subtitles.original: 胸が裂けていく
subtitles.english: My heart is tearing apart

subtitles.original: ズタズタになって歩くくらいは
subtitles.english: To the point where I walk in tatters

subtitles.original: 愛しくなっていく
subtitles.english: I'm becoming more dear

subtitles.original: 手も触れないまま 不確かにしてしまう
subtitles.english: Leaving things uncertain, without even touching hands

subtitles.original: ごめんね ごめんね
subtitles.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry

subtitles.original: いつか時間が経ってみたら
subtitles.english: If some time passes, and I look back

subtitles.original: なんでもないって顔をして
subtitles.english: With a face that says it's nothing

subtitles.original: 寂しさも 痛みすらも
subtitles.english: The loneliness, even the pain

subtitles.original: 抜け落ちて過去になる
subtitles.english: Will fall away and become the past

subtitles.original: いつしか そんな日が来たら
subtitles.english: When such a day eventually comes

subtitles.original: そんな時が来るのなら
subtitles.english: If such a time comes

subtitles.original: だったら今は
subtitles.english: Then for now...

subtitles.original: どうしようもないくらいに 君を想っている
subtitles.english: I'm thinking of you so much I can't help it

subtitles.original: 思い出になんてなれないくらい 君で出来ている
subtitles.english: I'm so made of you that we can't even just be a memory

subtitles.original: ずっと気づいていた
subtitles.english: I knew it all along

subtitles.original: 気づいてしまったんだ
subtitles.english: I've come to realize it

subtitles.original: 「忘れて」なんてね
subtitles.english: Saying "forget me"...

subtitles.original: 嘘だ
subtitles.english: Is a lie

subtitles.original: 愛しさが胸を焦がしていく
subtitles.english: My love is burning my chest

subtitles.original: 傷になったって覚えていて
subtitles.english: Even if it becomes a scar, please remember

subtitles.original: 忘れないでいて
subtitles.english: Please don't forget

subtitles.original: もう言えないから
subtitles.english: Because I can't say it anymore

subtitles.original: 今 歌を伝う
subtitles.english: Now, I convey it through song

subtitles.original: 笑って また会おう
subtitles.english: Let's meet again with a smile

subtitles.original: さよなら
subtitles.english: Goodbye

subtitles.original: さよなら
subtitles.english: Goodbye

subtitles.original: みんな本当に、本当に めっちゃ泣いちゃった。
subtitles.english: Everyone, really, really, I ended up crying so much.

subtitles.original: 最後まで見てくれて本当にありがとうございました。
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for watching until the very end.

subtitles.original: この6年半、約7年 応援してくれてありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you for supporting me for these six and a half years, almost seven years.

subtitles.original: ずっと見てくれてありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you for always watching.

subtitles.original: ずっと愛してくれてありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you for always loving me.

subtitles.original: バイバイ！ またね！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! See you later!

subtitles.original: 紫咲シオン 卒業LIVE
subtitles.english: Murasaki Shion Graduation LIVE

subtitles.original: 最大の感謝を込めて
subtitles.english: With My Utmost Gratitude
